datasets.name: 94dd0476
queryLines:
WITH metrics AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS total_tables,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_pii,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_pii,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_pii,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_pii
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
),
gap_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'critical' THEN 1 END) AS critical_gaps,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN severity = 'high' THEN 1 END) AS high_gaps
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
)
SELECT
  LEAST(100, CAST((m.critical_pii * 25 + m.high_pii * 15 + g.critical_gaps * 20 + g.high_gaps * 10) / GREATEST(1, m.total_tables * 2) AS INT)) AS risk_score,
  GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, CAST((m.critical_pii * 25 + m.high_pii * 15 + g.critical_gaps * 20 + g.high_gaps * 10) / GREATEST(1, m.total_tables * 2) AS INT))) AS compliance_score,
  CASE
    WHEN LEAST(100, CAST((m.critical_pii * 25 + m.high_pii * 15 + g.critical_gaps * 20 + g.high_gaps * 10) / GREATEST(1, m.total_tables * 2) AS INT)) > 70 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN LEAST(100, CAST((m.critical_pii * 25 + m.high_pii * 15 + g.critical_gaps * 20 + g.high_gaps * 10) / GREATEST(1, m.total_tables * 2) AS INT)) > 50 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN LEAST(100, CAST((m.critical_pii * 25 + m.high_pii * 15 + g.critical_gaps * 20 + g.high_gaps * 10) / GREATEST(1, m.total_tables * 2) AS INT)) > 25 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END AS risk_level
FROM metrics m
CROSS JOIN gap_metrics g;

datasets.name: c23c261a
queryLines:
SELECT
    pii_category,
    sensitivity_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS column_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS table_count,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY pii_category, sensitivity_tier
  ORDER BY column_count DESC

datasets.name: 495c015f
queryLines:
SELECT
    regulation,
    severity,
    COUNT(*) AS gap_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_affected
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
  GROUP BY regulation, severity
  ORDER BY gap_count DESC

datasets.name: 54bab87b
queryLines:
SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY
    CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
  ) AS priority,
  severity,
  rule_type,
  regulation,
  COUNT(*) AS gap_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_affected,
  FIRST(description) AS issue_description,
  FIRST(remediation) AS recommended_action
FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
GROUP BY severity, rule_type, regulation
ORDER BY priority
LIMIT 15;

datasets.name: c1f1f28b
queryLines:
SELECT
    DATE(discovered_at) AS discovery_date,
    COUNT(*) AS pii_found,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE discovered_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30)
  GROUP BY DATE(discovered_at)
  ORDER BY discovery_date

datasets.name: 262fcce2
queryLines:
SELECT
    pii_type,
    pii_category,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY pii_type, pii_category
  ORDER BY occurrences DESC
  LIMIT 15

datasets.name: a9a7c41b
queryLines:
SELECT
    catalog_name,
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    column_name,
    pii_type,
    pii_category,
    sensitivity_tier,
    ROUND(confidence, 2) AS confidence,
    classifier_source,
    regulations,
    discovered_at
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  ORDER BY
    CASE sensitivity_tier WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
    table_name,
    column_name

datasets.name: 0b22c1cc
queryLines:
SELECT
  MAX(scan_job_id) AS last_scan_job_id,
  MAX(discovered_at) AS last_scan_time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT scan_job_id) AS total_scans,
  DATEDIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), MAX(discovered_at)) AS days_since_last_scan
FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings;

datasets.name: 57781bd3
queryLines:
SELECT
  regulation,
  rule_type,
  severity,
  table_name,
  column_name,
  pii_type,
  description,
  remediation,
  detected_at
FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
ORDER BY
  CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  regulation;

datasets.name: 006b6b90
queryLines:
WITH pii AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_scanned,
    COUNT(*) AS total_pii_columns,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_pii,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_sensitivity_pii,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
),
gaps AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
    SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_gaps
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
)
SELECT p.*, g.total_gaps, g.critical_gaps
FROM pii p CROSS JOIN gaps g;

datasets.name: ab44b234
queryLines:
SELECT
    sensitivity_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY sensitivity_tier
  ORDER BY
    CASE sensitivity_tier
      WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
      WHEN 'high' THEN 2
      WHEN 'medium' THEN 3
      ELSE 4
    END

datasets.name: b4cbc6d9
queryLines:
SELECT
    catalog_name,
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    COUNT(*) AS pii_columns,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 3
      WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 2
      ELSE 1
    END) AS risk_score,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(COLLECT_LIST(pii_type)), ', ') AS pii_types
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY catalog_name, schema_name, table_name
  ORDER BY risk_score DESC

datasets.name: 7c293800
queryLines:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
    SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_gaps,
    SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_gaps,
    SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_gaps,
    COUNT(DISTINCT regulation) AS regulations_affected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_affected
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)

datasets.name: 2b551fa9
queryLines:
SELECT
    rule_type,
    COUNT(*) AS gap_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_affected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT regulation) AS regulations_count
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
  GROUP BY rule_type
  ORDER BY gap_count DESC

datasets.name: 6850504a
queryLines:
SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(catalog_name, '.', schema_name, '.', table_name)) AS total_tables,
    COUNT(*) AS total_columns,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pii_type) AS pii_types_found,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pii_category) AS categories_found
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)

datasets.name: 83e059c6
queryLines:
SELECT
    schema_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables,
    COUNT(*) AS pii_columns,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier IN ('critical', 'high') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_risk_columns,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY schema_name
  ORDER BY pii_columns DESC

datasets.name: 374f7b59
queryLines:
SELECT
    CONCAT(catalog_name, '.', schema_name, '.', table_name) AS full_table_name,
    COUNT(*) AS pii_columns,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 3
      WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 2
      ELSE 1
    END) AS risk_score
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY catalog_name, schema_name, table_name
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier IN ('critical', 'high') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
  ORDER BY risk_score DESC
  LIMIT 20

datasets.name: e1a2b3c4
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN confidence >= 0.9 THEN '90-100%'
      WHEN confidence >= 0.8 THEN '80-89%'
      WHEN confidence >= 0.7 THEN '70-79%'
      WHEN confidence >= 0.6 THEN '60-69%'
      ELSE 'Below 60%'
    END AS confidence_bucket,
    CASE
      WHEN confidence >= 0.9 THEN 1
      WHEN confidence >= 0.8 THEN 2
      WHEN confidence >= 0.7 THEN 3
      WHEN confidence >= 0.6 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_order,
    COUNT(*) AS finding_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pii_type) AS pii_types
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
  ORDER BY bucket_order

datasets.name: f2b3c4d5
queryLines:
SELECT
    classifier_source,
    COUNT(*) AS finding_count,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pii_type) AS pii_types_detected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_scanned
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY classifier_source
  ORDER BY finding_count DESC

datasets.name: a3b4c5d6
queryLines:
SELECT
    p.pii_type,
    p.sensitivity_tier,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.column_name) AS pii_columns,
    COUNT(DISTINCT g.gap_id) AS gap_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT g.gap_id) * 1.0 / GREATEST(1, COUNT(DISTINCT p.column_name)), 1) AS gaps_per_column
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings p
  LEFT JOIN compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps g
    ON p.table_name = g.table_name
    AND p.column_name = g.column_name
    AND p.scan_job_id = g.scan_job_id
  WHERE p.scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY p.pii_type, p.sensitivity_tier
  ORDER BY gap_count DESC

datasets.name: b4c5d6e7
queryLines:
SELECT
    pii_type,
    pii_category,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrences,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence,
    ROUND(MIN(confidence), 2) AS min_confidence,
    ROUND(MAX(confidence), 2) AS max_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY pii_type, pii_category
  ORDER BY avg_confidence ASC

datasets.name: c5d6e7f8
queryLines:
SELECT
    g.regulation,
    g.rule_type,
    g.severity,
    COUNT(*) AS gap_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT g.table_name) AS tables_affected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT g.pii_type) AS pii_types_involved
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps g
  WHERE g.scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.compliance_gaps)
  GROUP BY g.regulation, g.rule_type, g.severity
  ORDER BY
    CASE g.severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
    gap_count DESC

datasets.name: d6e7f8a9
queryLines:
SELECT
    scan_job_id,
    MIN(discovered_at) AS scan_start,
    MAX(discovered_at) AS scan_end,
    COUNT(*) AS findings_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS tables_scanned,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  GROUP BY scan_job_id
  ORDER BY scan_start DESC
  LIMIT 10

datasets.name: e7f8a9b0
queryLines:
SELECT
    column_data_type,
    COUNT(*) AS pii_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pii_type) AS pii_types,
    SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity_tier IN ('critical', 'high') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_risk_count,
    ROUND(AVG(confidence), 2) AS avg_confidence
  FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings
  WHERE scan_job_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_job_id) FROM compliance_pack.silver.pii_findings)
  GROUP BY column_data_type
  ORDER BY pii_count DESC

datasets.name: d9a10001
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_flows,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN has_pii_flow THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pii_flows,
  COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN has_pii_flow THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / GREATEST(COUNT(*), 1), 1), 0) AS pii_flow_pct
FROM compliance_pack.gold.data_lineage

datasets.name: d9a10002
queryLines:
SELECT source_table,
  COUNT(*) AS downstream_count,
  CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN has_pii_flow THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_pii
FROM compliance_pack.gold.data_lineage
GROUP BY source_table ORDER BY downstream_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: d9a10003
queryLines:
SELECT source_table, target_table, column_mapping,
  CASE WHEN has_pii_flow THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_pii_flow,
  mapped_at
FROM compliance_pack.gold.data_lineage
ORDER BY source_table, target_table

datasets.name: d0a10001
queryLines:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN exposure_level = 'critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS critical_exposures,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN exposure_level = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS high_exposures,
  COUNT(DISTINCT grantee) AS unique_principals,
  COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS unique_tables
FROM compliance_pack.gold.sensitive_data_exposure

datasets.name: d0a10002
queryLines:
SELECT exposure_level, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM compliance_pack.gold.sensitive_data_exposure
GROUP BY exposure_level
ORDER BY CASE exposure_level WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

datasets.name: d0a10003
queryLines:
SELECT pii_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM compliance_pack.gold.sensitive_data_exposure
GROUP BY pii_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: d0a10004
queryLines:
SELECT grantee, COUNT(*) AS exposure_count
FROM compliance_pack.gold.sensitive_data_exposure
GROUP BY grantee ORDER BY exposure_count DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: d0a10005
queryLines:
SELECT table_name, column_name, pii_type, grantee, privilege, exposure_level, detected_at
FROM compliance_pack.gold.sensitive_data_exposure
ORDER BY CASE exposure_level WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, table_name

datasets.name: d8a10001
queryLines:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN anomaly_flag = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_anomalous,
  COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN has_pii = true THEN user_name END), 0) AS users_accessing_pii,
  COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN has_pii = true AND anomaly_flag = true THEN table_name END), 0) AS pii_tables_anomalous
FROM compliance_pack.gold.access_patterns

datasets.name: d8a10002
queryLines:
SELECT user_name,
  SUM(access_count) AS total_access,
  CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN has_pii = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS accesses_pii
FROM compliance_pack.gold.access_patterns
GROUP BY user_name ORDER BY total_access DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: d8a10003
queryLines:
SELECT user_name, table_name, access_count, last_accessed,
  CASE WHEN has_pii = true THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS has_pii,
  CASE WHEN anomaly_flag = true THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS anomaly_flag,
  analyzed_at
FROM compliance_pack.gold.access_patterns
ORDER BY access_count DESC

datasets.name: dpia_latest_001
queryLines:
SELECT
  CONCAT('Q', QUARTER(generated_at), ' ', YEAR(generated_at)) AS quarter,
  generated_at,
  status,
  COALESCE(reviewed_by, '—') AS reviewer,
  reviewed_at,
  ROUND(latency_seconds, 1) AS latency_s,
  CASE WHEN parse_error IS NOT NULL THEN '⚠ parse error' ELSE 'OK' END AS parse_status,
  prompt_version,
  regulation_pack
FROM compliance_pack.compliance.dpia_runs
ORDER BY generated_at DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: dpia_history_001
queryLines:
SELECT
  CONCAT('Q', QUARTER(generated_at), ' ', YEAR(generated_at)) AS quarter,
  generated_at,
  run_id,
  status,
  COALESCE(reviewed_by, '—') AS reviewer,
  reviewed_at,
  ROUND(latency_seconds, 1) AS latency_s,
  CASE WHEN parse_error IS NOT NULL THEN '⚠ parse error' ELSE 'OK' END AS parse_status
FROM compliance_pack.compliance.dpia_runs
ORDER BY generated_at DESC
LIMIT 8

datasets.name: jur_dist
queryLines:
SELECT jurisdiction, COUNT_IF(jurisdiction IS NOT NULL) AS jurisdiction_associativity
FROM compliance_pack.silver.customers_tagged
GROUP BY jurisdiction
ORDER BY jurisdiction NULLS LAST

datasets.name: unmapped_principals
queryLines:
-- ADR-0001 Q3: count of principals with NULL jurisdiction (operationally
-- ungoverned — no pack can route their compliance rules until the
-- jurisdiction is backfilled or the principal is removed).
SELECT COUNT_IF(jurisdiction IS NULL) AS unmapped_count
FROM compliance_pack.silver.customers_tagged

frame.title: Filter by Jurisdiction (ADR-0001)
frame.description: Slices every Executive Overview tile by the principal's regulation pack: IN → DPDP, GB → UK GDPR. Leaving the filter unset returns all jurisdictions.

frame.title: Unmapped Principals
frame.description: Customers whose `jurisdiction` is NULL — no regulation pack can route their rules until backfilled (ADR-0001 Q3).

frame.title: PII Type to Compliance Gap Correlation
